found=customersDb.find(customer=>customer.id===id);return found||null;},180);};export const createCustomer=async input=>{return postWithFallback('/customers',input,()=>{const newCustomer={id:String(Date.now()),name:input.name.trim(),email:input.email.trim(),phone:input.phone.trim(),address:input.address.trim(),neighborhood:input.neighborhood.trim(),city:input.city.trim(),plan:input.plan.trim(),status:input.status,financial:{...input.financial},connection:{...input.connection}};customersDb=[newCustomer,...customersDb];return newCustomer;},220);};export const updateCustomer=async(id,input)=>{return patchWithFallback(`/customers/${id}`,input,()=>{const index=customersDb.findIndex(customer=>customer.id===id);if(index<0){return null;}const updated={...customersDb[index],name:input.name.trim(),email:input.email.trim(),phone:input.phone.trim(),address:input.address.trim(),neighborhood:input.neighborhood.trim(),city:input.city.trim(),plan:input.plan.trim(),status:input.status,financial:{...input.financial},connection:{...input.connection}};customersDb=customersDb.map(customer=>customer.id===id?updated:customer);return updated;},220);};
